title: Croatian-Inspired Italian Skewers
description: A creative twist on traditional skewers, combining the flavors of Croatia with the heart of Italy. Tofu and vegetables are marinated in a zesty mixture, then grilled to perfection.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, smoky paprika, salt, and a pinch of black pepper.
3. Add cubed tofu, sliced red bell pepper, and zucchini to the marinade. Toss to coat.
4. Thread tofu and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush grill with oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until tofu is golden brown and vegetables are tender.
7. Sprinkle crispy parmesan cheese over skewers.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
